'''√l-p-y''' ('''kalapay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macromodel|macromodel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macromodel|macromodel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-p-y
|-
! Lemma
| kalapay
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thilapay || jilapay || shilapay || kilapay
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthulapay || jujulapay || shushulapay || kukulapay
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thulapay || julapay || shulapay || kulapay
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thulapay || julapay || shulapay || kulapay
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thelapay || jelapay || shelapay || kelapay
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thotholapay || jojolapay || shosholapay || kokolapay
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tholapay || jolapay || sholapay || kolapay
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tholapay || jolapay || sholapay || kolapay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || lapay || lapay || lapay || lapay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lapay || lapay || lapay || lapay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lapay || lapay || lapay || lapay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lapay || lapay || lapay || lapay
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thælapay || jælapay || shælapay || kælapay
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathalapay || jajalapay || shashalapay || kakalapay
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thalapay || jalapay || shalapay || kalapay
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thalapay || jalapay || shalapay || kalapay
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shalapay
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshalapay
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishalapay
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shalapaynü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshalapaynknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishalapaynü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shalapayshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshalapaynkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishalapayshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shalapayro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshalapaynkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishalapayro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shalapaymu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshalapaynkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishalapaymu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shalapaysher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshalapaynksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishalapaysher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shalapayng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshalapaynkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishalapayng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shalapayya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshalapaynkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishalapayya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shalapayyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshalapaynkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishalapayyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shalapaynüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshalapaynknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishalapaynüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shalapaynüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalapaynknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalapaynüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shalapaynümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshalapaynknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalapaynümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shalapayshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshalapaynkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishalapayshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shalapayshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalapaynkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalapayshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shalapayshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshalapaynkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalapayshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shalapayronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshalapaynkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishalapayronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shalapayroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshalapaynkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishalapayroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shalapayromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshalapaynkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalapayromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shalapaymunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshalapaynkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishalapaymunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shalapaymushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshalapaynkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishalapaymushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shalapaymuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalapaynkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalapaymuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
